episode_summary: A Little Fish minisode where Andrew, James, and Anna share listener-submitted mini-facts ranging from football-name coincidences and guinea pig digestion to a New Zealand “road” that’s actually a ferry and the location of Miami University. They also rattle through rapid-fire curios including Miami University in Oxford, eucalyptus building woes, gluten-free communion rules, and WWII Citroën sabotage, before assigning “custodian” facts to supporters.

facts.fact: The recently dismissed coach or fortuna Dusseldorf is named Marcus Anfang, which translates to beginning and he's been replaced by Alexander Ender.
They poo while they're eating up to 1,000 times a day, but if they aren't eating, they can't poo.
This comes from Ferreri Dawn and they said that in August 2026, 200 metres of New Zealand State Highway 1 will be shipped to Singapore for repairs.
Miami University is located in Oxford.
